label: Clean Air Act
description: Enforces stricter emissions standards and funds urban greening to cut pollution exposure.
stakeholder_reaction_on: Green Council: 'Enforceable air standards are a generational win for public health and our children.' Business Alliance: 'Compliance costs will hit our manufacturing sector hard this quarter.'
stakeholder_reaction_off: Business Alliance: 'Rolling back these standards gives our industry room to breathe again.' Green Council: 'Abandoning clean air protections risks reversing a decade of progress.'
